lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਨ ਲਗੋ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh maaeaa mohu hai naam na lago piaar |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is emotionally attached to Maya - he has no love for the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਕੂੜੁ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹੈ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਰੇ ਆਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: koorr kamaavai koorr sangrahai koorr kare aahaar |
lines.english: He practices falsehood, gathers in falsehood, and makes falsehood his sustenance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਚਿ ਮਰਹਿ ਅੰਤੇ ਹੋਇ ਸਭੁ ਛਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bikh maaeaa dhan sanch mareh ante hoe sabh chhaar |
lines.english: He collects the poisonous wealth of Maya, and then dies; in the end, it is all reduced to ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਸੁਚ ਸੰਜਮ ਕਰਹਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲੋਭੁ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: karam dharam such sanjam kareh antar lobh vikaar |
lines.english: He practices religious rituals, purity and austere self-discipline, but within, there is greed and corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਖਾਣੀ ਆਪੇ ਬਾਣੀ ਆਪੇ ਖੰਡ ਵਰਭੰਡ ਕਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aape khaanee aape baanee aape khandd varabhandd kare |
lines.english: He Himself created the four sources of creation, and He Himself fashioned speech; He Himself formed the worlds and solar systems.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿ ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਸੁ ਥਾਇ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਦਰਗਹਿ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak ji manamukh kamaavai su thaae naa pavai darageh hoe khuaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, whatever the self-willed manmukh does, is not acceptable; in the Court of the Lord, he is dishonored. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਲਹਾਏ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਰੇ ਹਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aap lahaae kare jis kirapaa jis no guramukh kare hare |
lines.english: By His Grace, the Lord enables the Gurmukh to find these pearls.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਸਮੁੰਦੁ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਰਤਨ ਧਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aap samund aap hai saagar aape hee vich ratan dhare |
lines.english: He Himself is the ocean, and He Himself is the sea; He Himself puts the pearls in it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਬੋਹਿਥਾ ਆਪੇ ਖੇਵਟੁ ਆਪਿ ਤਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aape bhaujal aap hai bohithaa aape khevatt aap tare |
lines.english: He Himself is the terrifying world-ocean, and He Himself is the boat; He Himself is the boatman, and He Himself ferries us across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਸਫਲ ਹੈ ਜੇ ਕੋ ਕਰੇ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kee sevaa safal hai je ko kare chit laae |
lines.english: Fruitful is service to the True Guru, if one does so with a sincere mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰਤਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ਤੁਝੈ ਸਰੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: aape kare karaae karataa avar na doojaa tujhai sare |9|
lines.english: The Creator Himself acts, and causes us to act; no one else can equal You, Lord. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਟੀਐ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਮਤਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran dukh katteeai haumai mamataa jaae |
lines.english: The pains of birth and death are eradicated, and the mind is rid of egotism and self-conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਅਚਿੰਤੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: naam padaarath paaeeai achint vasai man aae |
lines.english: The treasure of the Naam, is obtained, and the mind comes to be free of anxiety.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਆਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak poorab jin kau likhiaa tinaa satigur miliaa aae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the True Guru comes and meets those who have such pre-ordained destiny. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਤਮ ਪਦਵੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਚੇ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: autam padavee paaeeai sache rahai samaae |
lines.english: One achieves the ultimate state, and remains absorbed in the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਵੈ ਜਿਨਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਚਾ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai su paar pavai jinaa andar sachaa soe |
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh crosses over; the True Lord dwells within him.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਹੈ ਕਲਿਜੁਗ ਬੋਹਿਥੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naam rataa satiguroo hai kalijug bohith hoe |
lines.english: The True Guru is imbued with the Naam, the Name of the Lord; He is the boat in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਕਰਮਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur paaeaa karam paraapat hoe |2|
lines.english: Nanak has found the True Guru; by His Grace, the Name is obtained. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮੑਾਲੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹੈ ਨਾਮੇ ਹੀ ਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naam samaale naam sangrahai naame hee pat hoe |
lines.english: He remembers the Naam, he gathers in the Naam, and he obtains honor through the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਪਾਪ ਖੰਡਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape tthaakur sevak aape aape hee paap khanddan |
lines.english: He Himself is the Lord and Master, He Himself is the servant, and He Himself is the Destroyer of sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਪਾਰਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਧਾਤੁ ਹੈ ਆਪਿ ਕੀਤੋਨੁ ਕੰਚਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape paaras aap dhaat hai aap keeton kanchan |
lines.english: He Himself is the Philosopher's Stone, He Himself is the metal, and He Himself is transformed into gold.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਬਿਬੇਕੁ ਆਪਿ ਸਭੁ ਬੇਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭੰਜਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: aap bibek aap sabh betaa aape guramukh bhanjan |
lines.english: He Himself is the discerning one, and He Himself is the Knower of all; He Himself breaks the bonds of the Gurmukhs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਭਿ ਘਟ ਭੋਗਵੈ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਸਭੁ ਅੰਜਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape sabh ghatt bhogavai suaamee aape hee sabh anjan |
lines.english: He Himself enjoys every heart; the Lord Master Himself is the basis of all illusion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਾਲਾਹਿ ਨ ਰਜੈ ਤੁਧੁ ਕਰਤੇ ਤੂ ਹਰਿ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਵਡਨੁ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: jan naanak saalaeh na rajai tudh karate too har sukhadaataa vaddan |10|
lines.english: Servant Nanak is not satisfied by merely praising You, O Creator Lord; You are the Great Giver of peace. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਜੀਅ ਕੇ ਬੰਧਨਾ ਜੇਤੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur seve jeea ke bandhanaa jete karam kamaeh |
lines.english: Without serving the True Guru, the deeds which are done are only chains binding the soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਠਵਰ ਨ ਪਾਵਹੀ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮਹਿ ਆਵਹਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur seve tthavar na paavahee mar jameh aaveh jaeh |
lines.english: Without serving the True Guru, they find no place of rest. They die, only to be born again - they continue coming and going.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਫਿਕਾ ਬੋਲਣਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur seve fikaa bolanaa naam na vasai man aae |
lines.english: Without serving the True Guru, their speech is insipid. They do not enshrine the Naam, the Name of the Lord, in the mind.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੇ ਲਗੈ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: eik satigur kee sevaa kareh chaakaree har naame lagai piaar |
lines.english: Some wait upon and serve the True Guru; they embrace love for the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਬਧੇ ਮਾਰੀਅਹਿ ਮੁਹਿ ਕਾਲੈ ਉਠਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak bin satigur seve jam pur badhe maareeeh muhi kaalai utth jaeh |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, without serving the True Guru, they are bound and gagged, and beaten in the City of Death; they depart with blackened faces. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਵਾਰਨਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਕੁਲ ਕਾ ਕਰਨਿ ਉਧਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak janam savaaran aapanaa kul kaa karan udhaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, they reform their lives, and redeem their generations as well. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਚਾਟਸਾਲ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਪਾਧਾ ਆਪੇ ਚਾਟੜੇ ਪੜਣ ਕਉ ਆਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: aape chaattasaal aap hai paadhaa aape chaattarre parran kau aane |
lines.english: He Himself is the school, He Himself is the teacher, and He Himself brings the students to be taught.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਪਿਤਾ ਮਾਤਾ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੇ ਬਾਲਕ ਕਰੇ ਸਿਆਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: aape pitaa maataa hai aape aape baalak kare siaane |
lines.english: He Himself is the father, He Himself is the mother, and He Himself makes the children wise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਮਹਲਿ ਬੁਲਾਏ ਜਾ ਆਪਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਸਚੇ ਭਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa andar mehal bulaae jaa aap terai man sache bhaane |
lines.english: Some, You summon to the Mansion of Your Presence within, when they are pleasing to Your Mind, O True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਥੈ ਪੜਿ ਬੁਝੈ ਸਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਇਕ ਥੈ ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਇਆਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: eik thai parr bujhai sabh aape ik thai aape kare eaane |
lines.english: In one place, He teaches them to read and understand everything, while in another place, He Himself makes them ignorant.
